feat.name: Tactical Guidance
feat.text: You can provide tactical guidance to help your follower act more efficiently. You can spend 2 actions to Direct your Follower instead of 1. If you do, your follower gains an additional action.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
